title: Add Mermaid diagrams for scope nesting, thread pool, and pattern matching (low priority)
description: Three low-priority diagram opportunities grouped together: (1) ferrum-introduction-to-ownership.md scope nesting hierarchy showing when variables in nested blocks are freed; (2) ferrum-introduction-to-async.md runtime thread pool showing how many tasks multiplex onto few OS threads; (3) ferrum-introduction-to-option-result.md pattern matching decision tree showing exhaustiveness for Option and Result variants. All three have adequate prose coverage already — diagrams would help visual learners only.
